papers.title: Measurements of Omega and Lambda from 42 High-Redshift Supernovae
papers.abstract: High-redshift Type Ia supernova observations provide evidence for an accelerating expansion and non-zero cosmological constant, constraining Omega_m and Omega_Lambda through distance-redshift relations.

papers.title: Planck 2018 results. VI. Cosmological parameters
papers.abstract: Planck CMB measurements provide precision constraints on cosmological parameters and dark energy equation-of-state extensions when combined with BAO and supernova data.

papers.title: Completed SDSS-IV extended Baryon Oscillation Spectroscopic Survey: Cosmological Implications from Two Decades of Spectroscopic Surveys at the Apache Point Observatory
papers.abstract: Final eBOSS analyses combine BAO and redshift-space distortion measurements to constrain expansion history and dark energy equation-of-state parameters including w0 and wa.

papers.title: The Pantheon+ Analysis: Cosmological Constraints
papers.abstract: Pantheon+ supernova compilation provides updated cosmological constraints and dark energy equation-of-state bounds, with improved treatment of calibration and sample systematics.

papers.title: DESI 2024 dark energy constraints from baryon acoustic oscillations
papers.abstract: Early DESI BAO measurements tighten constraints on expansion history and evolving dark energy models including w0-wa parameterizations.

papers.title: Observation of Gravitational Waves from a Binary Black Hole Merger
papers.abstract: First direct detection of gravitational waves from a binary black hole merger GW150914 by LIGO.

extracted_text_by_key.astro-ph/9812133: High-redshift Type Ia supernovae constrain Omega_m and Omega_Lambda through distance modulus and Hubble diagram fits, supporting accelerated expansion.
extracted_text_by_key.1807.06209: Planck 2018 CMB anisotropies combined with BAO and supernovae constrain dark energy equation-of-state extensions and expansion history.
extracted_text_by_key.2007.08991: Completed eBOSS BAO and RSD analyses constrain w0 and wa and improve dark energy evolution constraints with large-scale structure data.
extracted_text_by_key.2112.03863: Pantheon+ supernova compilation tightens dark energy equation-of-state constraints with improved photometric calibration and host-mass systematics modeling.
extracted_text_by_key.DESI 2024 dark energy constraints from b: DESI BAO measurements sharpen constraints on w0-wa and rho_DE(z) evolution.
extracted_text_by_key.1602.03837: GW150914 discovery report focuses on binary black hole merger physics and does not provide dark-energy or standard-siren cosmological constraints.
